mapper.select:
SELECT UTLINSTT_ID ,FUND_ID ,FUND_NM ,FUND_PTRN ,ORGZ_TRGPFT ,AUDIT_STG ,TO_TIMESTAMP(WODY) as wody ,FUND_DSNC ,TO_TIMESTAMP(RGSN_TS) as rgsnTs ,RGSN_USER_ID ,TO_TIMESTAMP(AMNN_TS) as amnnTs ,AMNN_USER_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PRDT_FUND_INFO_M WHERE AUDIT_STG IN ('AUD01001', 'AUD01002', 'AUD01003', 'AUD01004', 'AUD01005', 'AUD01006', 'cancel')
AND FUND_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchFundName} || '%'
ORDER BY WODY DESC

SELECT UTLINSTT_ID ,FUND_ID ,FUND_NM ,FUND_PTRN ,ORGZ_TRGPFT ,AUDIT_STG ,TO_TIMESTAMP(WODY) as wody ,TO_TIMESTAMP(RGSN_TS) as rgsnTs ,RGSN_USER_ID ,TO_TIMESTAMP(AMNN_TS) as amnnTs ,AMNN_USER_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PRDT_FUND_INFO_M WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY RGSN_TS DESC

SELECT UTLINSTT_ID ,FUND_ID ,FUND_NM ,FUND_PTRN ,ORGZ_TRGPFT ,IBK_INVSTMNT_PRPL_AMT ,STDR_ERN_RT ,CNTNNC_PDYY ,RSLT_MENDNG_IRR_EXCESS_ERN ,AUDIT_STG ,INVT_PDYY ,MNG_MENDNG_RT ,PMNT_MTHD ,INVT_TGT ,AUDIT_STG ,ORGZ_TGPR ,ORGZ_RTO ,IBK_PRPL_AMT ,IBK_PRPL_RTO ,RPLY_CON ,RGSN_USER_ID ,RGSN_TS ,TO_TIMESTAMP(WODY) as wody ,GP_FNCNINFO ,FUND_DSNC ,PROPOSAL_DOC_BASE_DAY FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PRDT_FUND_INFO_M WHERE FUND_ID = #{fundId}
SELECT FUND_ID ,SQN ,INVST_INST ,SPRN_FILD ,SPRN_AMT ,PROGRS_STG ,RGSN_USER_ID ,RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PRMR_LP_CHC_FILD_R WHERE FUND_ID = #{fundId}
SELECT FUND_ID ,SQN ,INVST_INST ,INVSTMNY ,RATE ,PROGRS_STG ,RGSN_USER_ID ,RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_FNCN_ENLS_PSST_R WHERE FUND_ID = #{fundId}
SELECT COUNT(*)+1 AS FUND_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PRDT_FUND_INFO_M

SELECT UTLINSTT_ID ,FUND_ID ,PRN_NM ,BZN ,RPRNM ,ADRES ,INCR_YMD ,FUND_OPR_TS ,CPTS_TTSM ,PAY_CAPL ,DSCPL_YN ,AST_TTSM_AMT ,LBLT_CPST_AMT ,CPTS_TTSM_AMT ,BSN_ERN ,BSN_CT ,CTNP_AMT ,AST_TTSM_AMT_1Y ,AST_TTSM_AMT_2Y ,LBLT_CPST_AMT_1Y ,LBLT_CPST_AMT_2Y ,CPTS_TTSM_AMT_1Y ,CPTS_TTSM_AMT_2Y ,BSN_ERN_1Y ,BSN_ERN_2Y ,BSN_CT_1Y ,BSN_CT_2Y ,CTNP_AMT_1Y ,CTNP_AMT_2Y ,PROGRS_STG ,OPRATN_SCALE_CO ,OPRATN_SCALE_AM ,BLIND_CO ,BLIND_AM ,PRJCT_CO ,PRJCT_AM ,LQD_FUND_ERNRT ,FUND_EXHS_RT ,OPRATN_HNF_INFO_TOT_CO ,OPRATN_HNF_INFO_MNGR_NM ,OPRATN_HNF_INFO_DSCPL_YN ,MANAGE_HNF_INFO_TOT_CO ,MANAGE_HNF_INFO_HNF ,MANAGEDTA_ATCHMNFL ,TO_TIMESTAMP(RGSN_TS) as rgsnTs ,RGSN_USER_ID , COGP_YN , MAJOR_PRN_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_OPERTR_INFO_R WHERE FUND_ID = #{fundId}
SELECT FUND_ID ,SQN ,OPRATN_HNF_NM ,NOW_HFFC_YN ,RM ,RGSN_TS ,RGSN_USER_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_OPRATN_HNF_MNTNC_RT_R WHERE FUND_ID = #{fundId} ORDER BY SQN ASC

SELECT FUND_ID ,SQN ,HMRS_DSNC ,PARTCPTN_NM ,INVT_CAREER ,CNWK_YY_CNT ,FIVE_FYER_INVM_AMT ,TEN_FYER_INVM_RTRVLACRS_INVT ,TEN_FYER_INVM_RTRVLACRS_RTRVL ,RGSN_TS ,RGSN_USER_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PROPSE_FUND_PARTCPTN_R WHERE FUND_ID = #{fundId} ORDER BY SQN ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOX_IVT_PRDT_FUND_INFO_M SET AUDIT_STG = #{auditStg} ,AMNN_TS = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE FUND_ID = #{fundId} AND UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

UPDATE TB_BOX_IVT_OPERTR_INFO_R oper SET (oper.PROGRS_STG) = (SELECT prdt.AUDIT_STG FROM TB_BOX_IVT_PRDT_FUND_INFO_M prdt WHERE prdt.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND prdt.FUND_ID = #{fundId}) ,AMNN_TS = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE oper.FUND_ID = #{fundId};
UPDATE TB_BOX_IVT_PRDT_FUND_INFO_M prdt SET (prdt.AUDIT_STG) = (SELECT oper.PROGRS_STG FROM TB_BOX_IVT_OPERTR_INFO_R oper WHERE oper.FUND_ID = #{fundId}) WHERE prdt.FUND_ID = #{fundId};
mapper.select: SELECT FUND_ID ,SQN ,NAME ,RMDP ,RMRK ,RGSN_TS ,RGSN_USER_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_OPRATN_HNF_INFO_DSCPL_L WHERE FUND_ID = #{fundId} ORDER BY SQN ASC
SELECT FILE_ID, FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_ETNS, FILE_PTRN, FILE_SIZE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M WHERE UPPER(FILE_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{fileId}) || '%'
SELECT FUND_ID ,RGSN_SQN ,STCH_NM ,PRTN_AMT ,PRTN_RTO ,RMRK ,RGSN_TS ,RGSN_USER_ID ,AMNN_TS ,AMNN_USER_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_FUND_STCH_CNFG_L WHERE FUND_ID = #{fundId} ORDER BY RGSN_SQN ASC
